description: Using Anaconda Navigator, launch Jupyter Notebook from the Home tab. Once Jupyter opens in Firefox, navigate to the ~/notebooks/ directory and create a new Python 3 notebook there. In the notebook, import pandas and matplotlib, load the wine quality dataset from '/home/ga/datasets/winequality-red.csv' (semicolon-separated), display the first 5 rows using .head(), compute summary statistics using .describe(), and create a histogram of the 'alcohol' column using matplotlib. Save the notebook as 'wine_analysis.ipynb' in the ~/notebooks/ directory.
